name: Gorgias

composio_registry_match.name: Gorgias
composio_registry_match.description: Gorgias is a helpdesk and live chat platform specializing in e-commerce, offering automated support, order management, and unified customer communication

description: A comprehensive ecommerce helpdesk platform that integrates AI agents with Shopify data to automate support and drive sales across multiple communication channels.
notes: Gorgias has a well-documented public API for developers and a robust developer portal, making it highly suitable for agent tooling.
